languages.text: "Идем со мной. Мы найдем того, кто пленил тебя и братьев, и призовем к ответу".
"Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."
languages.original_text: "Идем со мной. Мы найдем того, кто пленил тебя и братьев, и призовем к ответу".

traits.locale_text: "Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."
"Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."
"Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."

languages.text: 「俺についてこい。君と君の兄弟を捕らえた奴を見つけ、彼に裁きを下す」
languages.original_text: "Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."

traits.locale_text: 「俺についてこい。君と君の兄弟を捕らえた奴を見つけ、彼に裁きを下す。」

languages.text: «Acompáñeme. Encontraremos a quienquiera que los capturara a sus hermanos y a usted y lo traeremos ante la justicia».
languages.original_text: "Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."

traits.locale_text: «Acompáñeme. Encontraremos a quienquiera que los capturara a sus hermanos y a usted y lo traeremos ante la justicia».

languages.text: "Kommt mit mir. Wir finden heraus, wer Euch und Eure Brüder gefangen genommen hat und ziehen ihn zur Rechenschaft."
languages.original_text: "Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."

traits.locale_text: "Kommt mit mir. Wir finden heraus, wer Euch und Eure Brüder gefangen genommen hat und ziehen ihn zur Rechenschaft."

languages.text: « Venez avec moi. Nous allons retrouver celui qui vous a capturés, vous et vos frères, afin qu'il soit jugé. »
languages.original_text: "Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."

traits.locale_text: « Venez avec moi. Nous allons retrouver celui qui vous a capturés, vous et vos frères, afin qu'il soit jugé. »

languages.text: “加入我。我们一起找到俘虏你们的人，让他接受应有的审判。”
languages.original_text: "Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."

traits.locale_text: “加入我。我们一起找到俘虏你们的人，让他接受应有的审判。”

languages.text: "Benimle gel. Seni ve kardeşlerini esir alanı bulup cezasını vereceğiz."
languages.original_text: "Come with me. We will find the one who captured you and your brothers and bring him to justice."

traits.locale_text: "Benimle gel. Seni ve kardeşlerini esir alanı bulup cezasını vereceğiz."
